toolNotFound: Tool "{toolName}" is no longer in definitions — restart to apply definition changes
requireOneOfFailed: Search requires at least one of: {keys}
requireCombinationFailed: {resourceType} search requires one of these parameter sets: {sets}. Ask the user for the missing values.
countNotAdvertised: Note: _count was injected but {resourceType} does not advertise it in /metadata.
resourceNotAdvertised: {resourceType} is not advertised by this FHIR server's /metadata.
capabilityStrict: {msg}. Remove the unadvertised value or set FHIR_METADATA_MODE=warn.
capabilityWarn: Note: {msg} — this call may be vendor-specific.
paginationOriginMismatch: Pagination URL origin "{actual}" does not match FHIR server origin "{expected}"
paginationPathMismatch: Pagination URL path "{actual}" does not match any allowed FHIR base path
capabilitiesUnavailable: No /metadata available. The server may not support CapabilityStatement, or FHIR_METADATA_MODE is set to off.
responseAutoRetried: Note: Response exceeded byte limit at _count={original}. Auto-retried with _count={reduced} to fit within {limit} bytes.
invalidDateParam: "{param}" value "{value}" is not a valid FHIR date/dateTime — expected YYYY[-MM[-DD[THH:MM:SS[.fff][Z|±HH:MM]]]] with optional prefix (eq, ne, gt, lt, ge, le, sa, eb, ap)
responseTooLarge: Response too large ({bytes} bytes, limit {limit}). Retry with a narrower search, lower _count, date/category/status filters, or use paginate.
fhirpathFiltered: Locally filtered by FHIRPath: {matchCount} node(s) returned from {sourceBytes}-byte response.
fhirpathError: FHIRPath evaluation failed: {error}. Expression was not applied; raw response withheld to respect filter intent.
responseModeCompact: Compact mode applied — pass responseMode=full for raw FHIR JSON.
paginationChunked: Page too large for single response — delivering entries in chunks. Follow the next link to continue.
paginationChunkExpired: Local chunk expired or evicted. Re-fetch the original server page URL to retry.
terminologyInvalidCount: Invalid count "{count}" — must be a positive integer (max 50)
terminologyLookupNotFound: No concept found in {system} for code "{code}"
terminologyNoMoreResults: No more results in {system} for "{filter}" at offset {offset}
terminologyInvalidOffset: Invalid offset "{offset}" — must be a non-negative integer
writeNotEnabled: Write operation "{action}" is not enabled — set FHIR_WRITE_CAPABILITIES to allow it
writeMissingBody: {action} requires a 'body' parameter containing valid FHIR JSON
writeMissingId: {action} requires '_id' to identify the target resource
writeResourceTypeMismatch: body.resourceType ({actual}) does not match tool resource type ({expected})
writePatchInvalidFormat: patch body must be a JSON Patch array (RFC 6902) — expected [{op, path, ...}]
writeActionCreate: Use action=create with body containing full FHIR {resourceType} JSON to create a new resource.
writeActionUpdate: Use action=update with _id and body containing the complete FHIR {resourceType} JSON to replace an existing resource.
writeActionPatch: Use action=patch with _id and body containing a JSON Patch array (RFC 6902) to partially update a {resourceType}.
writeActionDelete: Use action=delete with _id to delete a {resourceType}.
vreadInvalidVid: _vid value "{value}" is not a valid FHIR version id
vreadNotAdvertised: {resourceType} does not advertise vread interaction in /metadata
historyNotAdvertised: {resourceType} does not advertise {form} history interaction in /metadata
operationNotFound: Unknown operation "{key}" — call capabilities to see available operations
operationMissingId: Operation {operation} requires an id parameter (instance-level invocation)
operationMissingBody: Operation {operation} requires a body parameter containing FHIR JSON
operationMissingRequiredParam: Operation {operation} requires at least one of: {keys}
operationMissingResourceType: Operation {operation} requires a resourceType parameter (polymorphic operation)
operationInvalidBody: Operation {operation} body is not valid JSON: {error}
operationScopeBlocked: Operation {operation} not permitted by granted scopes for {resource}
bundleNotEnabled: Bundle type "{type}" is not enabled — set FHIR_BUNDLE_CAPABILITIES to include it
bundleTypeNotAdvertised: This FHIR server does not advertise "{type}" in /metadata system interactions
bundleInvalidBody: body is not a valid FHIR Bundle: {error}
bundleInvalidType: Bundle type "{type}" is not batch or transaction
bundleEntryUnsupported: Entry {index}: unsupported request shape — only relative REST paths (Resource/id or Resource?query) are allowed in v1
bundleWriteNotAllowed: Entry {index}: write operation "{action}" is not in FHIR_WRITE_CAPABILITIES
